rulings.Case Title: MORROW VS ESTATE OF WENDELL F. FINCH
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS TO 1ST AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND INSUFFICIENT ALLEGATION RE AGENT OR REPRESENTATIVE OF LANDLORD RE SERVICE OF THREE DAY NOTICE. DEMURRER OF ROSSOFF TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND NO BASIS FOR DUTY TO MANAGE. DEMURRER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION MALICIOUS PROSECUTION OVERRULED SUFFICIENT ALLEGATION OF LACK OF PROBABLE CAUSE AND MALICE. (CW)
